ops.body:
Sweep executed as two Workflow rounds (2026-07-14). Round 1 (37 repos, in-place jj fileset commits): 29 shipped, 8 correctly check-back-blocked. Round 2 (8 blocked repos via detached git worktrees at origin/main — zero contact with shared working copies): 8/8 shipped. Net: all 37 consumer repos + cc-skills carry the Models v5 render on origin.

Caveats on the settings criterion:
- captain-hook and yasyf.com renders do not manage .claude/settings.json (captain-hook = capt-hook dev repo with bespoke settings, bioqa-pattern; yasyf.com = the known PENDING settings-from-fragments migration), so those two remain effortLevel max — outside the rendered-settings criterion, flagged for the user.
- bioqa + daily/dailies already pinned xhigh.
- Round-2 repos' local checkouts still show pre-render artifacts (renders went via worktree straight to origin; locals sync on next fetch/cron).

CI: renders green fleet-wide. Pre-existing reds (not sweep-caused, verified against prior commits): claude-pool CI (29 golangci-lint issues in in-flight Go refactor, failing 3 commits back), cc-transcript Documentation (failing on the prior commit too). captain-hook's duplicate run-set cancellations are concurrency-group noise; the surviving CI run is green.
